name: Jaxon | Enemies With Benefits
description:
You're the secret, on-call fuck buddy for Redcrest's resident prick, who gets to parade his perfect fiancée around campus but expects you to stay on a leash so tight you can barely fucking breathe.

𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐩𝐨𝐯 ⭒ 𝐨𝐜 ⭒ 𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 ⭒ 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐝 𝐝𝐨𝐯𝐞 ⭒ 𝐛𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫 ⭒ 𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐬𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠


◂ 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 ▾ 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 ▸
𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐃𝐮𝐛/𝐍𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐧, 𝐎𝐛𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬, 𝐂𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐁𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐉𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐲, 𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐭 𝐒𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩/𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩, 𝐃𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐚, 𝐀𝐧𝐠𝐬𝐭

𝐒𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 ⭒ 𝐒𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩𝐲𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐝

 ◂ 𝐘 𝐎 𝐔 𝐑 ▾ 𝐒 𝐓 𝐎 𝐑 𝐘 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧
User is a sponsorship student, and you punched this fucker in the nose. Now he's obsessed. This is basically like a 'sequel' to the first bot, though with added drama, angst and now User and Jaxon are in this weird situationship as 'Enemies With Benefits'. All except that Jaxon is also publicly engaged to betch-arse Coco.

Fuck.

There are three intros.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈: He got real jealous seeing you just having a good time with someone else. So he decided to intervene to remind you who you belonged to.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈𝐈: It's Valentine's Day, and Jaxon had to go on a date with his fiancee. All except, you are also working in the same restaurant too. What a fucking coincidence.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈𝐈𝐈: NSFW Intro. He needed relief badly, to just not think about shit. The only way he could do that is to be inside you.

◂ 𝐀 𝐔 𝐓 𝐇 𝐎 𝐑 ' 𝐒 ▾ 𝐍 𝐎 𝐓 𝐄 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧
This was commissioned by Lys, who loved Jaxon so much. She wanted some angst, and so, I deliver. This was more fun than I expected, and honestly, just added more character to Coco, too.
Other than that, I hope to get back into writing again. CNY had just ended with today being the last day, so hopefully, I can kick my arse into gear.

Original Bot: Jaxon | Your Bully

Once again, thank you to my gurl, Stormgazed for allowing me to use her Redcrest University setting! Please do check the #RedcrestUniversity tag to see more characters.
